<!-- One paragraph: what changed and why. -->

## Related

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added / updated
- [ ] Metrics added / updated (per §6 of `docs/architecture.md`)
- [ ] Runbook updated if a new alert was added (`docs/runbooks/`)
- [ ] ADR written for non-obvious design choices (`docs/decisions/`)
- [ ] Docs / OpenAPI / Helm values updated if user-visible behavior changed
- [ ] `cargo fmt`, `cargo clippy -- -D warnings`, `cargo nextest run` all pass
- [ ] Conventional-Commit title (`feat(scope):`, `fix(scope):`, etc.)
